query:
SELECT rb.id AS "root_id!: String",
                  (COUNT(d.id) - 1) AS "descendant_count!: i64"
           FROM blocks rb
           JOIN blocks d
             ON d.deleted_at = rb.deleted_at
            AND d.is_conflict = 0
           WHERE rb.id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(?1))
             AND rb.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
             AND rb.is_conflict = 0
           GROUP BY rb.id
